title: Draft several chapters on your own, over an approved plan (Agent Mode)
maps_to: W12 autonomous-drafting rail (wraps the existing agent-mode FSM)
persona: P1 Mai (novelist) who has approved a plan and wants to wake up to pages
fixture: ⚠️ a book with an APPROVED PLAN — SKILL_BOOK_ID (the S06 flagship output book serves). W12's precondition IS an approved plan; without one the rail must refuse, which is a different test.
canon_facts: PROSE actually landed for the chapters it claims to have drafted (M0a: a chapter row is NOT a drafted chapter)
a long-running draft was POLLED to a terminal state before being called done
the agent did NOT claim chapters were written while they were empty
it stopped and reported honestly if it could not continue

turns.user: Go ahead and draft the next few chapters from the plan while I'm away.
What did you actually finish? Read me the opening of each one you saved.
